dashboards.name: Quartet Member Finder - Product Health
dashboards.description: Core usage, analytics readiness, feedback, and route health.

insights.name: Daily active users
insights.description: Distinct signed-in users seen each day.

insights.name: Analytics client ready
insights.description: Browser sessions where the configured analytics client accepted its first app event.

insights.name: Weekly active users
insights.description: Distinct signed-in users seen each week.

insights.name: Top routes
insights.description: Route visits grouped by normalized app route.

dashboards.name: Quartet Member Finder - Launch Funnel
dashboards.description: From visiting the app to useful singer and quartet listing creation.

insights.name: Singer activation funnel
insights.description: Visit, authenticate, complete onboarding, and save a singer profile.

insights.name: Quartet activation funnel
insights.description: Visit, authenticate, complete onboarding, and save a quartet listing.

insights.name: Launch funnel by browser
insights.description: Core launch funnel broken down by browser.

insights.name: Launch funnel by device
insights.description: Core launch funnel broken down by device type.

dashboards.name: Quartet Member Finder - Discovery & Contact
dashboards.description: Whether users find relevant singers/quartets and turn discovery into app-mediated contact.

insights.name: Discovery searches by kind
insights.description: Singer search vs quartet opening search, excluding private query values.

insights.name: Map views by result type
insights.description: Whether the privacy-safe map is used for singers, quartet openings, or both.

insights.name: Discovery to contact funnel
insights.description: Search or map discovery leading to app-mediated contact request submission.

insights.name: Contact requests by target
insights.description: App-mediated contact volume by singer/quartet target.

insights.name: Contact requests by status
insights.description: Contact request delivery outcomes such as sent or stored.

dashboards.name: Quartet Member Finder - Operations & Privacy
dashboards.description: Launch density, visibility, privacy-safe feedback, and mobile/browser compatibility.

insights.name: Visible singer profiles saved
insights.description: Profiles saved with visibility enabled; useful for launch density.

insights.name: Visible quartet listings saved
insights.description: Quartet listings saved with visibility enabled; useful for launch density.

insights.name: Key actions by browser
insights.description: Profile, listing, search, and contact activity grouped by browser.

insights.name: Key actions by device
insights.description: Profile, listing, search, and contact activity grouped by device type.
